creator: araujo@bsdmail.org
text:
Hey Ion,

- I fixed and added DEPENDS for nagios.
- added pkg-message.in for information correct steps to install.

Regards.


> ----- Original Message -----
> From: "Ion-Mihai IOnutTetcu" <itetcu@FreeBSD.org>
